Metadata.CommitMsg:
fix: use URL params for orgSlug instead of auth store

Auth store resets on refresh since it has no persistence layer.
Read orgSlug from useParams() as the canonical source of truth in
Sidebar, TopBar, and all dashboard pages — with org.slug as fallback.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Metadata.Author: Jason Drane <claude@dranefamily.com>
